program_name: Bachelor of Science in Esports, Gaming, and AI Performance

governance.purpose: Policies, oversight, review cycles, faculty qualification rules, student-facing compliance documents

program.purpose: Degree structure, catalog language, outcome mapping, capstone framework, mission alignment

courses.purpose: Core course folders containing syllabi, assignments, assessments, AI integration, and outcomes alignment

electives.purpose: Elective course folders using the same academic structure as core courses

assessment.purpose: Program assessment plans, KPI templates, annual review tools, and closing-the-loop documentation

data.purpose: Program-level data templates and tracking files for enrollment, outcomes, completion, and AI use

mooc_integration.purpose: Playlist governance, instructional engagement mapping, and MOOC-related delivery records

templates.purpose: Reusable templates for syllabi, assignments, evidence logs, faculty records, and revision tracking
